option_line: rao_fastOneCb:"That must have been a different $playerName."
original: That must have been a different $playerName.
"It is, yes," he says. "And the absolute oaf in command who believed your ruse."
translated: "Ca l'est, oui," dit-il. "Et le parfait rustre au commandement qui a cru a votre ruse."

original:
He waves the thought away, then takes in a deep breath, quiet now, and drums his fingers on his console. Staring at you. Assessing.

"Let us speak plainly," he says.
translated:
Il balaye la pensee d'un geste, puis prend une profonde inspiration, silencieux maintenant, et tambourine des doigts sur sa console. Il vous fixe. Il vous jauge.

"Parlons franchement," dit-il.

original:
"Don't apologize for winning," he says. "It's unbecoming."

Rao takes in a deep breath, quiet now, and drums his fingers on his console. Staring at you. Assessing.

"Let us speak plainly," he says.
translated:
"Ne vous excusez pas de gagner," dit-il. "C'est malseant."

Rao prend une profonde inspiration, silencieux maintenant, et tambourine des doigts sur sa console. Il vous fixe. Il vous jauge.

"Parlons franchement," dit-il.

original:
He snorts at that.

Rao takes a quiet moment then drums his fingers on his console. Staring at you. Assessing.

"Let us speak plainly," he says.
translated:
Il renifle dedaigneusement.

Rao prend un instant de silence puis tambourine des doigts sur sa console. Il vous fixe. Il vous jauge.

"Parlons franchement," dit-il.

original:
"I'm glad to hear it, captain," he says. "Now we may speak plainly."

"From captain to... what have they made me, an $rank? My, it makes you wonder who's in charge, doesn't it."
translated:
"Ravi de l'entendre, capitaine," dit-il. "Maintenant nous pouvons parler franchement."

"De capitaine a... qu'est-ce qu'ils ont fait de moi, un $rank ? Eh bien, on se demande qui commande, n'est-ce pas."

original:
"One should think," he says pointedly. "But never mind- what I mean to say is that you played the ruse well."

"Better than a puffed-up uniform of the sort Eventide seems to spawn each cycle would. You remind me a bit of myself when I was younger and didn't have to sit at a desk."
translated:
"On devrait bien," dit-il avec insistance. "Mais peu importe - ce que je veux dire, c'est que vous avez bien joue la ruse."

"Mieux qu'un uniforme bouffi du genre qu'Eventide semble produire a chaque cycle. Vous me rappelez un peu moi-meme quand j'etais plus jeune et que je n'avais pas a rester assis derriere un bureau."

original:
"You played it well," he says.

"Outsmarted a puffed-up uniform of the sort Eventide seems to spawn more of each cycle. You remind me a bit of myself when I was younger and didn't have to sit at a desk."

He pauses a moment, studying you. "I had the thought..."
translated:
"Vous avez bien joue," dit-il.

"Vous avez roule un uniforme bouffi du genre qu'Eventide semble produire de plus en plus a chaque cycle. Vous me rappelez un peu moi-meme quand j'etais plus jeune et que je n'avais pas a rester assis derriere un bureau."

Il fait une pause, vous etudiant. "J'ai eu une idee..."

original: "She's a promising young woman." His voice fills with pride. "She's got the talent, I think."
translated: "C'est une jeune femme prometteuse." Sa voix se remplit de fierte. "Elle a du talent, je crois."
